name: Telegram Links Bot
description: A fast Telegram links bot with grammY, MongoDB Atlas, webhook mode, and owner commands.

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB Atlas connection string. Include a database name or the app will use links_bot.

OWNER_IDS.description: Comma-separated numeric Telegram user IDs allowed to manage links.

PUBLIC_URL.description: Public Heroku app URL, for example https://your-app.herokuapp.com.

LINKS_PER_PAGE.description: Links needed to unlock one public page.
